subject: transfer of bond business from enac to eci

emails.subject: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.subject_base: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.body: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI Richard Sage has asked us to change the slate of directors and officers of this entity to U.S. people, with the exception that perhaps Richard Sage will retain an officer title. Will you please provide to me a list of who the directors will be and who the officers will be and their respective titles. My understanding is that these elections should take place effective March 5, 2001. Please advise or if you would like to discuss please call me at X58444. Thanks for your assistance. Teresa

emails.subject: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.subject_base: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.body: Please let me know if this request should be directed to someone else's attention or if documents have already been prepared regarding changes that Mr. Sage requested. Thanks for your help with this matter. Teresa

emails.subject: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.subject_base: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.body: Teresa: Your emails have not gone unheeded! We were facilitating things for Richard and he needs to let us know his slate for the U.S. segment of the London business. We'll wait to hear from Richard. If you have any questions please give me a call. Thanks. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 03/21/2001 11:44 AM Sara Shackleton 03/20/2001 04:16 PM

emails.subject: RE: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.subject_base: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.body: Thanks I just did not want to drop the ball on my end by not pursuing I will wait to hear from you. Teresa
